conservative.name: Form of the Black Raven
conservative.requirements: 7 power, must perform the prepare manoeuvre

success.description: You assume the form of a raven. Place the Raven Beastform card on your character sheet - you can only use the physical characteristics of skills shown on the card. While in beastform, you can only use spells with the Beastform trait. You resume human form when you are knocked unconscious or killed, or when the act ends or you voluntarily end the spell as a manoeuvre. In any case, this card will not recharge until the end of the act.

boon.description: You may heal 1 normal wound as you change form

chaosStar.description: Your animal instincts take over. You add to all mental checks except Observation and Intuition while in beastform

reckless.name: Form of the Crow
reckless.requirements: 7 power, must perform the prepare manoeuvre

success.description: You assume the form of a crow. Place the Crow Beastform card on your character sheet - you can only use the physical characteristics of skills shown on the card. While in beastform, you can only use spells with the Beastform trait. You resume human form when you are knocked unconscious or killed, or when the act ends or you voluntarily end the spell as a manoeuvre. In any case, this card will not recharge until the end of the act.

boon.description: You may perform a free manoeuvre as you change form

chaosStar.description: Your animal instincts take over. You add to all mental checks except Observation and Intuition while in beastform
